name: Winter Wheat Hard Frost Limit
description: Prevents planting winter wheat when a hard frost event (< 28°F) is forecast within 7 days, which can kill newly germinated seedlings before they establish.
response_pass: Conditions met: Air temperature is above the hard frost threshold and no frost risk is forecast. Winter wheat planting is permitted.
response_fail: HARD STOP: A hard frost event is forecast within 7 days or current air temperature is below 28°F. Winter wheat seedlings cannot survive establishment under these conditions.
